name: ESS Tech, Inc.
summary: ESS Tech, Inc. (ticker: GWH) is an energy storage company that develops and manufactures iron flow battery systems for long-duration energy storage. The company focuses on providing alternatives to lithium-ion batteries, targeting commercial and utility-scale applications. ESS Tech went public through a Business Combination transaction and is listed on the NYSE.
